name: ExtensionCompartmentDefinition_Code
title: R5: Patient | Encounter | RelatedPerson | Practitioner | Device | EpisodeOfCare
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CompartmentDefinition.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CompartmentDefinition.code` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CompartmentDefinition.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `CompartmentDefinition.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `CompartmentDefinition.code` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CompartmentDefinition.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CompartmentDefinition.code` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: Patient | Encounter | RelatedPerson | Practitioner | Device | EpisodeOfCare
element.comment:
Element `CompartmentDefinition.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CompartmentDefinition.code` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Only the specification can define the compartments that can exist. Servers can choose to support them.

element.short: Patient | Encounter | RelatedPerson | Practitioner | Device | EpisodeOfCare
element.comment: Only the specification can define the compartments that can exist. Servers can choose to support them.
